rationale.P01: Real SEV1: Platform API HTTP 5xx at 0.41 vs 0.05 threshold, never auto-resolved, metrics show it climbing 0.005 -> 0.41 -> 0.47 and holding; pat-adminapi-5xx surging 1100% negative. Live production outage. Cardinal must-page.
rationale.P16: Independent real incident on a different service/root: ingest-gateway SEV2 HTTP 5xx at 0.22 vs 0.05, never auto-resolved, metrics rise 0.007 -> 0.22 -> 0.26 and hold; pat-ingest-5xx surging 640% negative on upstream connect errors. Customer-facing ingestion outage, not the Platform API one. Cardinal must-page.
rationale.P17: Independent real incident the meta-noise buries: checkout-api p99 latency SLO breach (recall trap). Only SEV3 and slow gradual rise (640 -> 910 -> 2180 -> 2740 -> 3120 -> 3360 ms vs 800 ms SLO), but it NEVER auto-resolves, has no deploy to blame, and pat-checkout-latency is surging 380% negative. Sustained customer-facing slowness. Cardinal must-page despite the low severity.
rationale.P02: Escalation-policy loop-back meta event: P7X2K9A re-routed to the same responder. Policy config defect, not a service outage. Suppress.
rationale.P03: Escalation-policy loop-back meta event: P7X2K9A re-routed to the same responder. Policy config defect, not a service outage. Suppress.
rationale.P04: Escalation-policy loop-back meta event: P7X2K9A re-routed to the same responder. Policy config defect, not a service outage. Suppress.
rationale.P05: Missed-ack reminder on transient staging CI (hourly_playwright_sev0_staging) that self-cleared in 120s. Process/alerting-hygiene meta event, no live outage. Suppress.
rationale.P06: Missed-ack reminder on transient staging CI that self-cleared in 110s. Process/alerting-hygiene meta event, no live outage. Suppress.
rationale.P07: Missed-ack reminder on transient staging CI that self-cleared in 95s. Process/alerting-hygiene meta event, no live outage. Suppress.
rationale.P08: Escalation-policy loop-back meta event: P7X2K9A re-routed to the same responder. Policy config defect, not a service outage. Suppress.
rationale.P09: Notification-delivery event (Slack/email succeeded), self-cleared in 60s. Transport confirmation, not an incident. Suppress.
rationale.P10: Missed-ack reminder on transient staging CI that self-cleared in 88s. Process/alerting-hygiene meta event, no live outage. Suppress.
rationale.P11: Escalation-policy loop-back meta event: P7X2K9A re-routed to the same responder. Policy config defect, not a service outage. Suppress.
rationale.P12: [ignore]-prefixed Default Log Threshold Monitor flapper: 14 fires/hr, self-clears in 18s, pat-log-threshold flat vs baseline. Suppress.
rationale.P13: Escalation-policy configuration warning (meta). Config hygiene, not a service outage. Suppress.
rationale.P14: Missed-ack reminder on transient staging CI that self-cleared in 100s. Process/alerting-hygiene meta event, no live outage. Suppress.
rationale.P15: Notification-delivery event (Slack/email succeeded), self-cleared in 55s. Transport confirmation, not an incident. Suppress.

notes: Three independent real incidents buried under PagerDuty escalation-policy meta-noise: P01 (Platform API SEV1 5xx), P16 (ingest-gateway SEV2 5xx, different service/root), and P17 (checkout-api p99 latency SLO breach, a SEV3 recall trap that rises slowly and never auto-resolves). Distinct patterns/services, so none collapse into another. All else is escalation loop-back, missed-ack reminders on transient staging CI, delivery confirmations, policy-config warnings, and an [ignore] log flapper.
